messages.content:
uv pip install vllm --torch-backend=auto --extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly
bash: uv: command not found

# The `uv` command is not installed

You need to install `uv` first. It's a fast Python package installer. Here are your options:

## Option 1: Install uv (Recommended - Faster)

```bash
# Install uv
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh

# Then run your command
uv pip install vllm --torch-backend=auto --extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly
```

## Option 2: Use pip instead (Traditional method)

```bash
pip install vllm --extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly
```

## Option 3: Install uv with pip

```bash
pip install uv

# Then run your command
uv pip install vllm --torch-backend=auto --extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly
```

---

**Note:** The `--torch-backend=auto` flag is specific to `uv`. If you use regular `pip`, you don't need that flag.

Which method would you like to use?
